            };
            dashEl.innerHTML = `
                <div class="stat-grid">
                    ${statCard('전체', total, '#3366FF')}
                    ${statCard('승인됨', approved, '#00b894', namesOf(m => m.status === 'approved'))}
                    ${statCard('대기', pending, '#f0a050', namesOf(m => m.status === 'pending'))}
                    ${statCard('거절', rejected, '#e74c3c', namesOf(m => m.status === 'rejected'))}
                </div>
                <div style="margin-top:14px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--wds-gray-700);font-weight:600">권한 분포</div>
                <div class="stat-grid" style="margin-top:6px">
                    ${statCard('총괄', supers, '#3366FF', namesOf(m => m.role === '총괄'))}
                    ${statCard('세션장', leaders, '#00b894', namesOf(m => m.role === '세션장'))}
                    ${statCard('일반', normals, '#999', namesOf(m => !m.role || m.role === '일반'))}
                </div>
                ${instList.length > 0 ? `
                <div style="margin-top:14px;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--wds-gray-700);font-weight:600">세션 분포 (승인된 멤버)</div>
                <div class="stat-grid" style="margin-top:6px">
                    ${instList.map(([k, names]) => statCard(k, names.length, '#3366FF', names)).join('')}
                </div>` : ''}
            `;

            const memberList = document.getElementById('memberList');
            if (!members || members.length === 0) {
                memberList.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--wds-gray-500);font-size:0.9rem">회원이 없습니다.</p>';
            } else {
                memberList.innerHTML = members.map(m => {
                    const statusMap = { pending: ['status-pending', '승인 대기'], approved: ['status-approved', '승인됨'], rejected: ['status-rejected', '거절됨'] };
                    const [sc, st] = statusMap[m.status] || statusMap['pending'];
                    const date = new Date(m.created_at).toLocaleDateString('ko-KR');
                    const role = m.role || '일반';
                    const roleColors = { '총괄': '#3366FF', '세션장': '#00b894', '일반': '#999' };
                    const roleColor = roleColors[role] || '#999';

                    let actions = '';
                    if (m.status === 'pending') {
                        if (canApproveMember()) actions += `<button type="button" class="approve-btn" onclick="approveMember('${m.id}')">승인</button>`;
                        if (canBanMember()) actions += `<button type="button" class="reject-btn" onclick="rejectMember('${m.id}')">거절</button>`;
                    } else if (m.status === 'approved') {
                        if (canBanMember()) actions += `<button type="button" class="reject-btn" onclick="rejectMember('${m.id}')">차단</button>`;
                    } else {
                        if (canApproveMember()) actions += `<button type="button" class="approve-btn" onclick="approveMember('${m.id}')">재승인</button>`;
                    }

                    const isS = isSuper();
                    const roleSelect = isS ? `
                        <select onchange="updateMemberRole('${m.id}', this.value)" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:0.8rem;padding:2px 6px;border:1px solid var(--wds-gray-300);border-radius:4px;color:${roleColor}">
                            <option value="일반" ${role==='일반'?'selected':''}>일반</option>
                            <option value="세션장" ${role==='세션장'?'selected':''}>세션장</option>
                            <option value="총괄" ${role==='총괄'?'selected':''}>총괄</option>
                        </select>` : '';

                    const contactLine = isS ? `<div class="my-res-time">${m.email || ''} · ${m.phone || ''} · ${date}</div>` : `<div class="my-res-time">${date}</div>`;
                    const instText = m.instruments ? `<div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--wds-primary);margin-top:2px">🎵 ${m.instruments}</div>` : '';
                    return `<div class="my-res-item" style="margin-bottom:8px">
                        <div class="my-res-info">
                            <div class="my-res-date">${m.name} <span class="status-badge ${sc}">${st}</span></div>
                            ${contactLine}
                            ${instText}
                            ${roleSelect}
                        </div>
                        <div>${actions}</div>
                    </div>`;
                }).join('');
            }
        }

        function renderAdminNoticeSection(container) {
            const noticeSection = document.createElement('div');
            noticeSection.className = 'admin-section';
            noticeSection.innerHTML = `
                <div class="admin-section-title">📢 공지사항 관리</div>
                <div class="notice-input-group">
                    <input type="text" id="noticeTitle" placeholder="공지 제목">
                    <textarea id="noticeContent" placeholder="공지 내용"></textarea>
                    <button type="button" class="admin-post-btn" onclick="postNotice()">공지 등록</button>
                </div>
                <div id="adminNoticeList"></div>
            `;
            container.appendChild(noticeSection);
            renderAdminNotices();
        }

        async function cancelReservation(id, isAdmin = false) {
            const confirmMsg = isAdmin ? "관리자 권한으로 이 예약을 강제로 취소하시겠습니까?" : "정말로 예약을 취소하시겠습니까?";
            if (!confirm(confirmMsg)) return;

            const { error } = await supabaseClient
                .from('reservations')
                .delete()
                .eq('id', id);

            if (error) {
                alert("취소 실패: " + error.message);
            } else {
                alert(isAdmin ? "예약이 강제로 취소되었습니다." : "예약이 취소되었습니다.");
                fetchReservations(); // 내역 갱신
            }
        }

        function renderMonth(container) {
            const grid = document.createElement('div'); grid.className = 'calendar-grid';
            ['일', '월', '화', '수', '목', '금', '토'].forEach(h => {
                const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'calendar-day-header'; el.textContent = h; grid.appendChild(el);
            });
            const d = state.viewDate;
            const startDay = new Date(d.getFullYear(), d.getMonth(), 1).getDay();
            const lastDate = new Date(d.getFullYear(), d.getMonth() + 1, 0).getDate();
            for (let i = 0; i < startDay; i++) grid.appendChild(Object.assign(document.createElement('div'), {className: 'calendar-day empty'}));
            const today = new Date();
            for (let i = 1; i <= lastDate; i++) {
                const day = document.createElement('div'); day.className = 'calendar-day';
                const numEl = document.createElement('div'); numEl.className = 'cal-day-num'; numEl.textContent = i;
                day.appendChild(numEl);
                const loopDate = new Date(d.getFullYear(), d.getMonth(), i);
                if (isSameDay(loopDate, today)) day.classList.add('today');
                if (state.selectedDate && isSameDay(loopDate, state.selectedDate)) day.classList.add('selected');

                // 해당 날짜의 예약 요약 (시작-종료 시간 표시)
                const dayRes = state.reservations
                    .filter(r => isSameDay(new Date(r.res_date), loopDate))
                    .filter(r => r.status === 'approved' || r.status === 'pending')
                    .sort((a, b) => TIMES.indexOf(a.start_time) - TIMES.indexOf(b.start_time));
                if (dayRes.length > 0) {
                    const info = document.createElement('div'); info.className = 'cal-day-info';
                    const display = dayRes.slice(0, 3);
                    display.forEach(r => {
                        const startH = parseInt(r.start_time.split(':')[0]);
                        const endStr = TIMES[TIMES.indexOf(r.end_time) + 1] || '23:00';
                        const endH = parseInt(endStr.split(':')[0]);
                        const cls = r.status === 'approved' ? 'approved' : 'pending';
                        const icon = r.status === 'approved' ? '✓' : '⏳';
                        info.innerHTML += `<span class="${cls}">${icon}${startH}-${endH}시</span>`;
                    });
                    if (dayRes.length > 3) {
                        info.innerHTML += `<span style="color:var(--wds-gray-500)">+${dayRes.length - 3}건</span>`;
                    }
                    day.appendChild(info);
                }

                day.onclick = () => { state.viewDate = loopDate; state.currentView = 'day'; document.querySelectorAll('.tab').forEach(t => t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.view === 'day')); render(); };
                grid.appendChild(day);
            }
            container.appendChild(grid);
        }

        function renderWeek(container) {
            const wrap = document.createElement('div'); wrap.className = 'weekly-container';
            const grid = document.createElement('div'); grid.className = 'weekly-grid';
            grid.appendChild(Object.assign(document.createElement('div'), {className: 'weekly-cell weekly-header-cell'}));
            const base = new Date(state.viewDate);
            base.setDate(base.getDate() - base.getDay()); // 일요일 시작
            const days = ['일', '월', '화', '수', '목', '금', '토'];
            const today = new Date();
            for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
                const d = new Date(base); d.setDate(base.getDate() + i);
                const h = document.createElement('div'); h.className = 'weekly-cell weekly-header-cell';
                if (i === 0) h.classList.add('week-sun');
                if (i === 6) h.classList.add('week-sat');
                if (isSameDay(d, today)) h.classList.add('week-today');
                h.innerHTML = `<div style="font-size:0.7rem; opacity:0.75">${days[d.getDay()]}</div><div>${d.getDate()}</div>`;
                grid.appendChild(h);
            }
            TIMES.forEach((time, idx) => {
                const endTime = TIMES[idx + 1] || '23:00';
                const tc = document.createElement('div');
                tc.className = 'weekly-cell weekly-time-cell';
                tc.style.lineHeight = '1.15';
                tc.innerHTML = `<div style="font-weight:600;font-size:0.82rem">${time}</div><div style="font-size:0.64rem;color:var(--wds-gray-500)">~${endTime}</div>`;
                grid.appendChild(tc);
                for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
                    const d = new Date(base); d.setDate(base.getDate() + i);
                    const s = document.createElement('div'); s.className = 'weekly-cell weekly-slot';
                    if (i === 0) s.classList.add('week-sun');
                    if (i === 6) s.classList.add('week-sat');
                    if (isSameDay(d, today)) s.classList.add('week-today');

                    const block = getBlock(d, time);
                    const occupiedRes = getOccupiedReservation(d, time);
                    if (block) {
                        s.style.background = '#ffe5e5';
                        s.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
                        s.style.fontSize = '0.65rem';
                        s.style.color = '#c0392b';
                        s.style.padding = '4px 2px';
                        s.style.overflow = 'hidden';
                        s.style.textOverflow = 'ellipsis';
                        s.style.whiteSpace = 'nowrap';
                        s.textContent = block.reason ? `🚫 ${block.reason}` : '🚫 차단';
                        s.title = block.reason || '예약 차단됨';
                    } else if (occupiedRes) {
                        s.style.background = '#eee';
                        s.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
                        s.style.fontSize = '0.72rem';
                        s.style.color = 'var(--wds-gray-700)';
                        s.textContent = maskName(occupiedRes.user_name);
                    } else {
                        if (isSlotSelected(d, time)) s.classList.add('selected');
                        s.onclick = () => onSlotClick(d, time);
                    }
                    grid.appendChild(s);
                }
            });
            wrap.appendChild(grid); container.appendChild(wrap);
        }

        function renderDay(container) {
            const grid = document.createElement('div'); grid.className = 'weekly-grid day-grid'; grid.style.gridTemplateColumns = '130px 1fr';
            TIMES.forEach((time, idx) => {
                const endTime = TIMES[idx + 1] || '23:00';
                const tc = document.createElement('div');
                tc.className = 'weekly-cell weekly-time-cell';
                tc.style.lineHeight = '1.3';
                tc.innerHTML = `<div style="font-weight:600">${time}</div><div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--wds-gray-500)">~ ${endTime}</div>`;
                grid.appendChild(tc);
                const s = document.createElement('div'); s.className = 'weekly-cell weekly-slot'; s.style.textAlign = 'left'; s.style.paddingLeft = '24px';
                
                const block = getBlock(state.viewDate, time);
                const occupiedRes = getOccupiedReservation(state.viewDate, time);
                if (block) {
                    s.style.background = '#ffe5e5';
                    s.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
                    s.style.color = '#c0392b';
                    s.innerHTML = `🚫 예약 차단됨${block.reason ? ` <span style="color:var(--wds-gray-500);font-size:0.82rem">(${block.reason})</span>` : ''}`;
                } else if (occupiedRes) {
                    s.style.background = '#eee';
                    s.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
                    s.innerHTML = `이미 예약됨 <span style="color:var(--wds-gray-500);font-size:0.82rem">(${maskName(occupiedRes.user_name)})</span>`;
                } else {
                    if (isSlotSelected(state.viewDate, time)) {
                        s.classList.add('selected');
                        if (state.startTime === time && (!state.endTime || state.endTime === time)) s.textContent = '🟢 시작';
                        else if (state.startTime === time) s.textContent = '🟢 시작';
                        else if (state.endTime === time) s.textContent = '🔴 끝';
                        else s.textContent = '선택됨';
                    }
                    s.onclick = () => onSlotClick(state.viewDate, time);
                }
                grid.appendChild(s);
            });
            container.appendChild(grid);

            // 선택 요약
            if (state.startTime && state.selectedDate && isSameDay(state.selectedDate, state.viewDate)) {
                const summary = document.createElement('div');
                summary.style.cssText = 'margin-top:14px;padding:14px;background:var(--wds-primary-light);border-radius:var(--wds-radius-m);text-align:center;font-size:0.95rem;color:var(--wds-primary);font-weight:600';
                const endIdx = state.endTime ? TIMES.indexOf(state.endTime) : TIMES.indexOf(state.startTime);
                const endStr = TIMES[endIdx + 1] || '23:00';
                summary.textContent = state.endTime
                    ? `✅ 선택: ${state.startTime} ~ ${endStr}`
                    : `🟢 시작: ${state.startTime} — 끝 시간을 클릭하세요`;
                container.appendChild(summary);
            }
        }

        function maskName(name) {
            if (!name) return '?';
            if (name.length === 1) return name + '*';
            return name[0] + '*'.repeat(name.length - 1);
        }

        function getOccupiedReservation(date, time) {
            return state.reservations.find(r => {
                if (!isSameDay(new Date(r.res_date), date)) return false;
                const startIdx = TIMES.indexOf(r.start_time);
                const endIdx = TIMES.indexOf(r.end_time);
                const curIdx = TIMES.indexOf(time);
                return curIdx >= startIdx && curIdx <= endIdx;
            }) || null;
        }

        function isOccupied(date, time) {
            return !!getOccupiedReservation(date, time);
        }

        function getBlock(date, time) {
            const dow = date.getDay();
            const tIdx = TIMES.indexOf(time);
            const dateStr = date.toLocaleDateString('en-CA');
            return state.blocks.find(b => {
                if (b.day_of_week !== dow) return false;
                const sIdx = TIMES.indexOf(b.start_time);
                const eIdx = TIMES.indexOf(b.end_time);
                if (!(tIdx >= sIdx && tIdx <= eIdx)) return false;
                if (b.start_date && dateStr < b.start_date) return false;
                if (b.end_date && dateStr > b.end_date) return false;
                return true;
            }) || null;
        }
        function isBlocked(date, time) { return !!getBlock(date, time); }

        async function fetchBlocks() {
            if (!supabaseClient) return;
            const { data, error } = await supabaseClient.from('time_blocks').select('*');
            if (!error) state.blocks = data || [];
        }

        function onSlotClick(date, time) {
            if (!state.selectedDate || !isSameDay(state.selectedDate, date)) {
                state.selectedDate = new Date(date); state.startTime = time; state.endTime = null;
            } else {
                if (!state.startTime || (state.startTime && state.endTime)) { state.startTime = time; state.endTime = null; }
                else {
                    const startIdx = TIMES.indexOf(state.startTime), curIdx = TIMES.indexOf(time);
                    if (curIdx < startIdx) { state.startTime = time; state.endTime = TIMES[startIdx]; }
                    else if (curIdx === startIdx) { state.startTime = null; }
                    else { state.endTime = time; }
                }
            }
            render();
        }

        function isSlotSelected(date, time) {
            if (!state.selectedDate || !isSameDay(state.selectedDate, date) || !state.startTime) return false;
            const startIdx = TIMES.indexOf(state.startTime), curIdx = TIMES.indexOf(time);
            if (!state.endTime) return curIdx === startIdx;
            const endIdx = TIMES.indexOf(state.endTime);
            return curIdx >= startIdx && curIdx <= endIdx;
        }

        function isSameDay(d1, d2) { return d1.getFullYear() === d2.getFullYear() && d1.getMonth() === d2.getMonth() && d1.getDate() === d2.getDate(); }

        async function onReserve(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            if (!state.selectedDate || !state.startTime) { alert("날짜와 시간을 선택해주세요."); return; }
            if (!state.endTime) { alert("최소 2시간 이상 예약이 가능합니다."); return; }
            if (!supabaseClient) { alert("Supabase 설정이 필요합니다."); return; }

            const startIdx = TIMES.indexOf(state.startTime), endIdx = TIMES.indexOf(state.endTime);
            for (let i = startIdx; i <= endIdx; i++) {
                const blk = getBlock(state.selectedDate, TIMES[i]);
                if (blk) { alert('차단된 시간이 포함되어 있습니다.' + (blk.reason ? `\n사유: ${blk.reason}` : '')); return; }
            }
            const name = (state.user && state.user.nickname) || document.getElementById('userNameInput').value || '';
            if (!name) { alert('사용자 정보를 불러오지 못했습니다. 다시 로그인해주세요.'); return; }
            // 로컬 시간 기준으로 날짜 문자열 생성 (YYYY-MM-DD)
            const dateStr = state.selectedDate.toLocaleDateString('en-CA'); 

            const { data, error } = await supabaseClient
                .from('reservations')
                .insert([{
                    kakao_id: state.user.kakaoId,
                    user_name: name,
                    res_date: dateStr,
                    start_time: state.startTime,
                    end_time: state.endTime,
                    status: 'pending'
                }]);

            if (error) {
                alert("예약 실패: " + error.message);
            } else {
                const timeStr = `${state.startTime} ~ ${TIMES[endIdx + 1] || '23:00'}`;
                const res = document.getElementById('result');
                res.style.display = 'block';
                res.innerHTML = `<strong>${name}</strong>님, <strong>${dateStr} ${timeStr}</strong> 예약 신청 완료!<br><small style="opacity:0.8">관리자 승인 후 확정됩니다.</small>`;
                state.selectedDate = null; state.startTime = null; state.endTime = null;
                fetchReservations();
                window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
            }
        }

        // --- 이메일 인증 ---
        function toggleInstrument(btn) {
            btn.classList.toggle('selected');
        }

        function showSignupForm() {
            document.getElementById('email-login-form').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('email-signup-form').classList.remove('hidden');
        }

        function showLoginForm() {
            document.getElementById('email-signup-form').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('email-login-form').classList.remove('hidden');
        }

        function showPendingScreen(name) {
            document.getElementById('landing-page').classList.add('hidden');
            document.getElementById('pending-screen').classList.remove('hidden');
            document.getElementById('pendingName').textContent = name;
        }

        async function handleEmailSignup() {
            const name = document.getElementById('signupName').value.trim();
            const phone = document.getElementById('signupPhone').value.trim();
            const email = document.getElementById('signupEmail').value.trim();
            const password = document.getElementById('signupPassword').value;
            const confirm = document.getElementById('signupPasswordConfirm').value;
            const consent = document.getElementById('privacyConsent').checked;

            if (!name || !phone || !email || !password) { alert('모든 항목을 입력해주세요.'); return; }
            if (!/^010-\d{4}-\d{4}$/.test(phone) && !/^01[0-9]{8,9}$/.test(phone.replace(/-/g, ''))) { alert('올바른 전화번호를 입력해주세요. (예: 010-0000-0000)'); return; }
            if (password.length < 6) { alert('비밀번호는 6자 이상이어야 합니다.'); return; }
            if (password !== confirm) { alert('비밀번호가 일치하지 않습니다.'); return; }
            if (!consent) { alert('개인정보 수집·이용에 동의해주세요.'); return; }

            // 악기 수집
            const selectedInsts = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.inst-btn.selected')).map(b => b.dataset.inst);
            const customInsts = ['customInst1']
                .map(id => document.getElementById(id).value.trim())
                .filter(v => v);
            const instruments = [...selectedInsts, ...customInsts].join(', ');
            if (!instruments) { alert('메인 세션을 1개 이상 선택하거나 입력해주세요.'); return; }

            const { data, error } = await supabaseClient.auth.signUp({ email, password });
            if (error) { alert('회원가입 실패: ' + error.message); return; }
            if (!data.user) { alert('회원가입 처리에 문제가 발생했습니다.'); return; }

            const { error: pErr } = await supabaseClient.from('profiles').insert([{
                id: data.user.id, name, phone, email, instruments, status: 'pending'
            }]);
            if (pErr) { alert('프로필 저장 실패: ' + pErr.message); return; }

            alert('회원가입 신청이 완료되었습니다.\n관리자 승인 후 이용 가능합니다.');
            showPendingScreen(name);
        }

        async function handleEmailLogin() {
            const email = document.getElementById('loginEmail').value.trim();
            const password = document.getElementById('loginPassword').value;
            if (!email || !password) { alert('이메일과 비밀번호를 입력해주세요.'); return; }

            const { data, error } = await supabaseClient.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password });
            if (error) { alert('로그인 실패: ' + error.message); return; }
            await checkEmailUserApproval(data.user);
        }

        async function checkEmailUserApproval(user) {
            const { data, error } = await supabaseClient.from('profiles').select('*').eq('id', user.id).single();
            if (error || !data) { alert('프로필 정보를 불러올 수 없습니다.'); await supabaseClient.auth.signOut(); return; }

            if (data.status === 'approved') {
                state.user = { nickname: data.name, kakaoId: user.id, authType: 'email', role: data.role || '일반' };
                loginUI(data.name);
            } else if (data.status === 'rejected') {
                alert('회원가입이 거절되었습니다. 관리자에게 문의해주세요.');
                await supabaseClient.auth.signOut();
            } else {
                showPendingScreen(data.name);
            }
        }

        // --- 회원 관리 ---
        async function fetchMembers() {
            if (!supabaseClient) return [];
            const { data, error } = await supabaseClient.from('profiles').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });
            return error ? [] : data;
        }

        async function approveMember(id) {
            const { error } = await supabaseClient.from('profiles').update({ status: 'approved' }).eq('id', id);
            if (error) alert('승인 실패: ' + error.message);
            else render();
        }

        async function rejectMember(id) {
            if (!confirm('이 회원의 가입을 거절하시겠습니까?')) return;
            const { error } = await supabaseClient.from('profiles').update({ status: 'rejected' }).eq('id', id);
            if (error) alert('거절 실패: ' + error.message);
            else render();
        }

        async function updateMemberRole(id, role) {
            const { error } = await supabaseClient.from('profiles').update({ role }).eq('id', id);
            if (error) alert('권한 변경 실패: ' + error.message);
        }

        // --- 예약 승인/거절 ---
        async function approveReservation(id) {
            const { error } = await supabaseClient.from('reservations').update({ status: 'approved' }).eq('id', id);
            if (error) alert('승인 실패: ' + error.message);
            else { fetchReservations(); }
        }

        async function rejectReservation(id) {
            if (!confirm('이 예약을 거절하시겠습니까?')) return;
            const { error } = await supabaseClient.from('reservations').update({ status: 'rejected' }).eq('id', id);
            if (error) alert('거절 실패: ' + error.message);
            else { fetchReservations(); }
        }

        // --- 공지사항 ---
        let notices = [];

        async function fetchNotices() {
            if (!supabaseClient) return;
            const { data, error } = await supabaseClient.from('notices').select('*').order('created_at', { ascending: false });
            if (!error) { notices = data; renderNotices(); }
        }

        function renderNotices() {
            const container = document.getElementById('notice_container');
            if (!notices || notices.length === 0) { container.classList.add('hidden'); return; }
            container.classList.remove('hidden');
            container.innerHTML = notices.map(n => {
                const date = new Date(n.created_at).toLocaleDateString('ko-KR');
                const isAdmin = state.user && state.user.kakaoId === ADMIN_ID;
                return `<div class="notice-card">
                    <div class="notice-header">
                        <span class="notice-title">📢 ${n.title.replace(/</g,'<')}</span>
                        <span style="display:flex;align-items:center">
                            <span class="notice-date">${date}</span>
                            ${isAdmin ? `<button class="notice-delete-btn" onclick="deleteNotice('${n.id}')">삭제</button>` : ''}
                        </span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="notice-content">${n.content.replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>')}</div>
                </div>`;
            }).join('');
        }

        function renderAdminNotices() {
            const list = document.getElementById('adminNoticeList');
            if (!list) return;
            if (!notices || notices.length === 0) { list.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--wds-gray-500);font-size:0.9rem">등록된 공지가 없습니다.</p>'; return; }
            list.innerHTML = notices.map(n => {
                const date = new Date(n.created_at).toLocaleDateString('ko-KR');
                return `<div class="my-res-item" style="margin-bottom:8px">
                    <div><strong>${n.title.replace(/</g,'<')}</strong> <span style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--wds-gray-500)">${date}</span></div>
                    <button type="button" class="cancel-btn" onclick="deleteNotice('${n.id}')">삭제</button>
                </div>`;
            }).join('');
        }

        async function postNotice() {
            const title = document.getElementById('noticeTitle').value.trim();
            const content = document.getElementById('noticeContent').value.trim();
            if (!title || !content) { alert('제목과 내용을 입력해주세요.'); return; }
            const { error } = await supabaseClient.from('notices').insert([{ title, content }]);
            if (error) { alert('공지 등록 실패: ' + error.message); return; }
            document.getElementById('noticeTitle').value = '';
            document.getElementById('noticeContent').value = '';
            await fetchNotices();
            renderAdminNotices();
        }

        async function deleteNotice(id) {
            if (!confirm('공지사항을 삭제하시겠습니까?')) return;
            const { error } = await supabaseClient.from('notices').delete().eq('id', id);
            if (error) { alert('삭제 실패: ' + error.message); return; }
            await fetchNotices();
            renderAdminNotices();
        }

        // --- Comments ---
        async function fetchComments() {
            if (!supabaseClient) return;
            const { data, error } = await supabaseClient
                .from('comments')
                .select('*')
                .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
            if (!error) renderComments(data);
        }

        function renderComments(comments) {
            const list = document.getElementById('commentList');
            if (!comments || comments.length === 0) {
                list.innerHTML = '<p class="comment-empty">아직 댓글이 없습니다. 첫 댓글을 남겨보세요!</p>';
                return;
            }
            const likedKey = state.user ? 'liked_' + state.user.kakaoId : '';
            const liked = likedKey ? JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(likedKey) || '[]') : [];

            const parents = comments.filter(c => !c.parent_id).sort((a,b) => new Date(b.created_at) - new Date(a.created_at));
            const replyMap = {};
            comments.filter(c => c.parent_id).forEach(c => {
                (replyMap[c.parent_id] = replyMap[c.parent_id] || []).push(c);
            });
            Object.keys(replyMap).forEach(p => replyMap[p].sort((a,b) => new Date(a.created_at) - new Date(b.created_at)));

            const renderItem = (c, isReply, parentComment) => {
                const date = new Date(c.created_at).toLocaleString('ko-KR', { year: 'numeric', month: '2-digit', day: '2-digit', hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
                const isMine = state.user && state.user.kakaoId === c.kakao_id;
                const isLiked = liked.includes(String(c.id));
                const likesCount = c.likes || 0;
                let canDelete = false;
                if (state.user) {
                    if (isMine) canDelete = true;
                    else if (!isReply && isSuper()) canDelete = true;
                    else if (isReply && parentComment && state.user.kakaoId === parentComment.kakao_id) canDelete = true;
                    else if (isReply && isSuper()) canDelete = true;
                }
                return `
                    <div class="comment-item${isReply ? ' comment-reply' : ''}">
                        <div style="flex:1">
                            <div class="comment-meta"><strong>${c.user_name}</strong>${date}</div>
                            <div class="comment-content">${c.content.replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>')}</div>
                            <div class="comment-actions">
                                <button class="like-btn ${isLiked ? 'liked' : ''}" onclick="likeComment('${c.id}')">❤️ 좋아요 ${likesCount}개</button>
                                ${!isReply ? `<button class="reply-btn" onclick="toggleReplyForm('${c.id}')">💬 답글</button>` : ''}
                            </div>
                            ${!isReply ? `<div id="reply-form-${c.id}" class="reply-form hidden">
                                <textarea id="replyInput-${c.id}" placeholder="답글을 입력하세요..."></textarea>
                                <button type="button" onclick="postReply('${c.id}')">답글 등록</button>
                            </div>` : ''}
                        </div>
                        ${canDelete ? `<button class="comment-delete-btn" onclick="deleteComment('${c.id}')">삭제</button>` : ''}
                    </div>`;
            };

            list.innerHTML = parents.map(p => {
                let html = renderItem(p, false);
                const replies = replyMap[p.id] || [];
                if (replies.length > 0) {
                    html += `<div class="reply-toggle" onclick="toggleReplies('${p.id}')"><span id="reply-toggle-text-${p.id}">▼ 답글 ${replies.length}개 보기</span></div>`;
                    html += `<div class="comment-replies hidden" id="replies-${p.id}">${replies.map(r => renderItem(r, true, p)).join('')}</div>`;
                }
                return html;
            }).join('');
        }

        function toggleReplyForm(parentId) {
            const form = document.getElementById('reply-form-' + parentId);
            if (form) form.classList.toggle('hidden');
        }

        function toggleReplies(parentId) {
            const repliesEl = document.getElementById('replies-' + parentId);
            const toggleEl = document.getElementById('reply-toggle-text-' + parentId);
            if (!repliesEl || !toggleEl) return;
            const willHide = !repliesEl.classList.contains('hidden');
            repliesEl.classList.toggle('hidden');
            const count = repliesEl.querySelectorAll('.comment-reply').length;
            toggleEl.textContent = willHide ? `▼ 답글 ${count}개 보기` : `▲ 답글 ${count}개 숨기기`;
        }

        async function postReply(parentId) {
            if (!state.user) { alert('로그인이 필요합니다.'); return; }
            const input = document.getElementById('replyInput-' + parentId);
            const content = input.value.trim();
            if (!content) { alert('답글 내용을 입력해주세요.'); return; }
            const { error } = await supabaseClient.from('comments').insert([{
                kakao_id: state.user.kakaoId, user_name: state.user.nickname, content, parent_id: parentId
            }]);
            if (error) {
                alert('답글 등록 실패: ' + error.message + '\n\nparent_id 컬럼이 없다면:\nALTER TABLE comments ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS parent_id uuid REFERENCES comments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;');
                return;
            }
            input.value = '';
            fetchComments();
        }

        async function postComment() {
            if (!state.user) { alert('로그인이 필요합니다.'); return; }
            const input = document.getElementById('commentInput');
            const content = input.value.trim();
            if (!content) { alert('댓글 내용을 입력해주세요.'); return; }

            const { error } = await supabaseClient
                .from('comments')
                .insert([{ kakao_id: state.user.kakaoId, user_name: state.user.nickname, content }]);

            if (error) {
                alert('댓글 등록 실패: ' + error.message);
            } else {
                input.value = '';
                fetchComments();
            }
        }

        async function likeComment(id) {
            if (!state.user) { alert('로그인이 필요합니다.'); return; }
            const likedKey = 'liked_' + state.user.kakaoId;
            const liked = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(likedKey) || '[]');
            const sid = String(id);
            const alreadyLiked = liked.includes(sid);

            const { data: comment, error: selErr } = await supabaseClient.from('comments').select('likes').eq('id', id).single();
            if (selErr) {
                alert('좋아요 오류: ' + selErr.message + '\n\nSupabase SQL Editor에서 실행 필요:\nALTER TABLE comments ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS likes integer DEFAULT 0;');
                return;
            }
            const current = comment ? (comment.likes || 0) : 0;
            const newCount = alreadyLiked ? Math.max(0, current - 1) : current + 1;
            const { error: updErr } = await supabaseClient.from('comments').update({ likes: newCount }).eq('id', id);
            if (updErr) {
                alert('좋아요 업데이트 실패: ' + updErr.message);
                return;
            }

            const newLiked = alreadyLiked ? liked.filter(x => x !== sid) : [...liked, sid];
            localStorage.setItem(likedKey, JSON.stringify(newLiked));
            fetchComments();
        }

        // --- 자동 로그아웃 ---
        let inactivityTimer = null;
        let warnTimer = null;
        const INACTIVITY_MS = 5 * 60 * 1000;

        function showToast(msg, duration = 3500) {
            const t = document.getElementById('auto-toast');
            if (!t) return;
            t.textContent = msg;
            t.style.opacity = '1';
            setTimeout(() => { t.style.opacity = '0'; }, duration);
        }

        function resetInactivityTimer() {
            if (!state.user) return;
            clearTimeout(inactivityTimer);
            clearTimeout(warnTimer);
            warnTimer = setTimeout(() => showToast('⚠️ 1분 후 자동 로그아웃됩니다.', 10000), INACTIVITY_MS - 60000);
            inactivityTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
                showToast('자동 로그아웃되었습니다.');
                await handleLogout();
            }, INACTIVITY_MS);
        }

        function startInactivityWatcher() {
            ['mousemove', 'mousedown', 'keypress', 'scroll', 'touchstart', 'click'].forEach(ev => {
                document.addEventListener(ev, resetInactivityTimer, true);
            });
            resetInactivityTimer();
        }

        function stopInactivityWatcher() {
            clearTimeout(inactivityTimer);
            clearTimeout(warnTimer);
            inactivityTimer = null;
            warnTimer = null;
        }

        async function deleteComment(id) {
            if (!confirm('댓글을 삭제하시겠습니까?')) return;
            const { data, error } = await supabaseClient
                .from('comments')
                .delete()
                .eq('id', id)
                .select();
            if (error) {
                alert('삭제 실패: ' + error.message);
                return;
            }
            if (!data || data.length === 0) {
                alert('삭제 권한이 없습니다.\nSupabase SQL Editor에서 실행 필요:\nCREATE POLICY "allow delete comments" ON comments FOR DELETE USING (true);');
                return;
            }
            fetchComments();
        }

        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initApp);
    </script>
</body>
</html>

args.instruction: Add showMypageRegisterForm and hideMypageRegisterForm functions. Update saveMypageProfile to handle profile creation for Kakao users (where profileId is null). Ensure name and phone validation are performed during registration.

resultDisplay.originalContent:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Gather All Around | Premium Studio</title>
    <!-- Pretendard Font -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" as="style" crossorigin href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/orioncactus/pretendard@v1.3.9/dist/web/static/pretendard.min.css" />
    <style>
        :root {
            --wds-primary: #3366FF;
            --wds-primary-hover: #254EDB;
            --wds-primary-light: #EBF0FF;
            --wds-black: #111111;
            --wds-gray-900: #333333;
            --wds-gray-700: #666666;
            --wds-gray-500: #999999;
            --wds-gray-300: #E1E2E3;
            --wds-gray-100: #F7F7F7;
            --wds-white: #FFFFFF;
            --wds-radius-s: 4px;
            --wds-radius-m: 8px;
            --wds-radius-l: 16px;
            --wds-shadow-lg: 0 10px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
            --kakao-yellow: #FEE500;
        }

        * { box-sizing: border-box; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }

        body {
            font-family: 'Pretendard', -apple-system, sans-serif;
            background-color: #fcfcfc;
            color: var(--wds-black);
            margin: 0;
            padding: 40px 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }

        .hidden { display: none !important; }

        /* Landing/Login Hero */
        #landing-page {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 480px;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 60px 40px;
            background: var(--wds-white);
            border-radius: var(--wds-radius-l);
            box-shadow: var(--wds-shadow-lg);
            border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300);
            margin-top: 10vh;
        }

        #landing-page h1 { font-size: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 12px; letter-spacing: -1px; }
        #landing-page p { color: var(--wds-gray-700); margin-bottom: 40px; font-size: 1.1rem; }

        .kakao-login-btn {
            background: none;
            border: none;
            padding: 0;
            cursor: pointer;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 300px;
            transition: transform 0.2s;
        }

        .kakao-login-btn img { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }
        .kakao-login-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); }

        /* Main Container */
        .container {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 800px;
            background: var(--wds-white);
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: var(--wds-radius-l);
            border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300);
            box-shadow: var(--wds-shadow-lg);
            margin-bottom: 40px;
        }

        header { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 40px; }
        h1 { font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 8px; letter-spacing: -0.8px; }
        .subtitle { color: var(--wds-gray-500); font-size: 1rem; }

        .user-info {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 16px 24px;
            background: var(--wds-gray-100);
            border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m);
            margin-bottom: 32px;
            border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300);
        }

        .logout-btn { color: var(--wds-gray-500); cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; text-decoration: underline; }

        /* Reservation Form */
        .form-group { margin-bottom: 32px; }
        .label { display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: 1rem; }
        input[type="text"] {
            width: 100%;
            height: 52px;
            padding: 0 16px;
            border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300);
            border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            outline: none;
        }

        /* Tabs & Navigation */
        .tabs { display: flex; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--wds-gray-100); margin-bottom: 24px; gap: 24px; }
        .tab { padding: 12px 4px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--wds-gray-500); cursor: pointer; position: relative; }
        .tab.active { color: var(--wds-primary); }
        .tab.active::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 3px; background-color: var(--wds-primary); }

        .view-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 20px; }
        .view-title { font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; }
        .nav-btns { display: flex; gap: 8px; }
        .nav-btn { padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-s); background: white; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; }

        /* Views */
        .calendar-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr); gap: 8px; }
        .calendar-day-header { text-align: center; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--wds-gray-500); padding-bottom: 12px; }
        .calendar-day { min-height: 70px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start; cursor: pointer; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); transition: 0.2s; padding: 4px; gap: 2px; }
        .cal-day-num { font-size: 0.95rem; }
        .cal-day-info { font-size: 0.62rem; line-height: 1.2; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; gap: 1px; width: 100%; padding: 0 2px; }
        .cal-day-info span { white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; text-align: center; }
        .cal-day-info .approved { color: var(--wds-primary); font-weight: 600; }
        .cal-day-info .pending { color: #f0a050; }

        /* 주간 뷰 강조 */
        .weekly-header-cell.week-sun { color: #e74c3c; }
        .weekly-header-cell.week-sat { color: #3498db; }
        .weekly-header-cell.week-today { background: var(--wds-primary-light) !important; color: var(--wds-primary); }
        .weekly-slot.week-today { background: rgba(51, 102, 255, 0.05); }
        .weekly-slot.week-sun { background: rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.03); }
        .weekly-slot.week-sat { background: rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.03); }
        .calendar-day:hover:not(.empty) { background: var(--wds-gray-100); }
        .calendar-day.today { color: var(--wds-primary); font-weight: 700; background: var(--wds-primary-light); }
        .calendar-day.selected { background: var(--wds-primary) !important; color: white !important; }
        .calendar-day.empty { cursor: default; }

        .weekly-container { overflow-x: auto; }
        .weekly-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 80px repeat(7, 1fr); border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); }
        .weekly-cell { padding: 12px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-100); border-right: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-100); text-align: center; }
        .weekly-header-cell { background: var(--wds-gray-100); font-weight: 600; padding: 16px 8px; }
        .weekly-time-cell { background: var(--wds-gray-100); color: var(--wds-gray-500); font-size: 0.85rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
        .weekly-slot { cursor: pointer; height: 48px; }
        .weekly-slot:hover { background: var(--wds-primary-light); }
        .weekly-slot.selected { background: var(--wds-primary) !important; }

        .submit-btn {
            width: 100%;
            height: 60px;
            background: var(--wds-primary);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: 0.2s;
        }
        .submit-btn:hover { background: var(--wds-primary-hover); }

        #comments_container { width: 100%; max-width: 800px; padding: 32px; background: white; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-l); border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); box-shadow: var(--wds-shadow-lg); }
        #comments_container h2 { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 20px; }

        .comment-form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 28px; }
        .comment-form textarea {
            width: 100%; padding: 14px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300);
            border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.95rem;
            resize: vertical; outline: none; min-height: 80px;
        }
        .comment-form textarea:focus { border-color: var(--wds-primary); }
        .comment-submit-btn {
            align-self: flex-end; padding: 10px 24px; background: var(--wds-primary);
            color: white; border: none; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m);
            font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.2s;
        }
        .comment-submit-btn:hover { background: var(--wds-primary-hover); }

        .comment-item {
            padding: 16px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-100);
            display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px;
        }
        .comment-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
        .comment-meta { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--wds-gray-500); margin-bottom: 6px; }
        .comment-meta strong { color: var(--wds-black); font-weight: 700; margin-right: 8px; }
        .comment-content { font-size: 0.97rem; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap; }
        .comment-delete-btn {
            flex-shrink: 0; border: none; background: none; color: var(--wds-gray-500);
            font-size: 0.82rem; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: underline; padding: 0;
        }
        .comment-empty { text-align: center; padding: 32px; color: var(--wds-gray-500); }

        .result-card { display: none; margin-top: 24px; padding: 24px; background: #F0F5FF; border: 1px solid #D0E0FF; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-l); color: var(--wds-primary); }

        /* 내 예약 / 관리자 스타일 */
        .my-res-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
        .my-res-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 16px 20px; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); background: var(--wds-gray-100); }
        .my-res-date { font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 4px; }
        .my-res-time { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--wds-gray-700); }
        .cancel-btn { padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid #ff4d4f; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-s); background: white; color: #ff4d4f; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; }

        /* 공지사항 */
        #notice_container { width: 100%; max-width: 800px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
        .notice-card { padding: 16px 20px; background: #FFFBEB; border: 1px solid #FDE68A; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); margin-bottom: 10px; }
        .notice-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 6px; }
        .notice-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; }
        .notice-date { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--wds-gray-500); flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: 12px; }
        .notice-content { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--wds-gray-700); line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap; }
        .notice-delete-btn { border: none; background: none; color: var(--wds-gray-500); font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: underline; margin-left: 8px; }

        /* 상태 배지 */
        .status-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; margin-left: 8px; }
        .status-pending { background: #FEF3C7; color: #92400E; }
        .status-approved { background: #D1FAE5; color: #065F46; }
        .status-rejected { background: #FEE2E2; color: #991B1B; }

        /* 관리자 섹션 */
        .admin-section { margin-bottom: 32px; }
        .admin-section-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--wds-gray-100); }
        .notice-input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
        .notice-input-group input, .notice-input-group textarea { padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.9rem; outline: none; }
        .notice-input-group textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 60px; }
        .approve-btn { padding: 6px 14px; border: 1px solid #10B981; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-s); background: white; color: #10B981; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.82rem; margin-right: 6px; }
        .reject-btn { padding: 6px 14px; border: 1px solid #EF4444; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-s); background: white; color: #EF4444; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.82rem; }
        .admin-post-btn { padding: 10px 20px; background: var(--wds-black); color: white; border: none; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; align-self: flex-end; }

        /* 이메일 인증 */
        .auth-tabs { display: flex; gap: 0; margin-bottom: 28px; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); overflow: hidden; }
        .auth-tab { flex: 1; padding: 12px; background: var(--wds-gray-100); border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--wds-gray-500); transition: 0.2s; }
        .auth-tab.active { background: var(--wds-primary); color: white; }
        .email-form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }
        .email-form input[type="email"], .email-form input[type="password"], .email-form input[type="text"], .email-form input[type="tel"] {
            width: 100%; height: 48px; padding: 0 14px; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300);
            border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.95rem; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box;
        }
        .email-form input:focus { border-color: var(--wds-primary); }
        .email-primary-btn { width: 100%; height: 48px; background: var(--wds-primary); color: white; border: none; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; margin-top: 4px; }
        .email-secondary-btn { width: 100%; height: 40px; background: none; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--wds-gray-700); cursor: pointer; }
        .privacy-box { padding: 12px; background: var(--wds-gray-100); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--wds-gray-700); line-height: 1.6; text-align: left; max-height: 130px; overflow-y: auto; }
        .privacy-box strong { color: var(--wds-black); }
        .privacy-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--wds-gray-900); cursor: pointer; padding: 4px 2px; }
        .privacy-label input[type="checkbox"] { width: 18px; height: 18px; cursor: pointer; }

        /* 카카오 구분선 */
        .kakao-divider { display: flex; align-items: center; margin: 24px 0 16px; gap: 12px; }
        .kakao-divider::before, .kakao-divider::after { content: ''; flex: 1; height: 1px; background: var(--wds-gray-300); }
        .kakao-divider span { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--wds-gray-500); }

        /* 악기 선택 */
        .instrument-section { margin: 4px 0; }
        .form-label-text { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--wds-gray-900); margin-bottom: 10px; text-align: left; }
        .instrument-buttons { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
        .inst-btn { padding: 10px 14px; background: white; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.9rem; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.15s; color: var(--wds-gray-900); }
        .inst-btn:hover { border-color: var(--wds-primary); }
        .inst-btn.selected { background: var(--wds-primary-light); border-color: var(--wds-primary); color: var(--wds-primary); font-weight: 700; }
        .instrument-customs { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }
        .instrument-customs input { height: 40px; font-size: 0.9rem; }

        /* 승인 대기 화면 */
        #pending-screen { width: 100%; max-width: 480px; text-align: center; padding: 60px 40px; background: var(--wds-white); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-l); box-shadow: var(--wds-shadow-lg); border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); margin-top: 10vh; }
        #pending-screen .pending-icon { font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
        #pending-screen h2 { font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 12px; }
        #pending-screen p { color: var(--wds-gray-700); font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 32px; }

        /* 관리자 서브탭 */
        .admin-subtabs { display: flex; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--wds-gray-300); margin-bottom: 20px; gap: 0; }
        .admin-subtab { padding: 10px 18px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--wds-gray-500); border-bottom: 3px solid transparent; margin-bottom: -2px; transition: all 0.15s; }
        .admin-subtab.active { color: var(--wds-primary); border-bottom-color: var(--wds-primary); }
        .admin-subtab:hover { color: var(--wds-gray-900); }

        /* 댓글 좋아요 버튼 */
        .like-btn { background: none; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: 20px; padding: 3px 10px; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; color: var(--wds-gray-500); transition: all 0.15s; margin-top: 6px; }
        .like-btn:hover { border-color: #ff6b6b; color: #ff6b6b; }
        .like-btn.liked { border-color: #ff6b6b; color: #ff6b6b; background: #fff5f5; }

        /* 토스트 알림 */
        #auto-toast { position: fixed; bottom: 28px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); background: #222; color: #fff; padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 28px; font-size: 0.9rem; z-index: 9999; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.35s; pointer-events: none; white-space: nowrap; }

        /* 멤버 대시보드 */
        .stat-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(110px, 1fr)); gap: 8px; }
        .stat-card { background: var(--wds-gray-100); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); padding: 12px 14px; }
        .stat-label { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--wds-gray-700); margin-bottom: 4px; }
        .stat-value { font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--wds-black); }
        .stat-names { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--wds-gray-700); margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.4; max-height: 96px; overflow-y: auto; word-break: keep-all; }
        .stat-names:empty { display: none; }

        /* 댓글 답글 */
        .comment-replies { margin-left: 32px; padding-left: 12px; border-left: 2px solid var(--wds-gray-300); margin-top: 4px; }
        .comment-reply { background: var(--wds-gray-100); }
        .comment-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        .comment-actions .like-btn { margin-top: 0; }
        .reply-btn { background: none; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: 20px; padding: 3px 10px; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; color: var(--wds-gray-500); transition: all 0.15s; }
        .reply-btn:hover { border-color: var(--wds-primary); color: var(--wds-primary); }
        .reply-form { margin-top: 8px; }
        .reply-form textarea { width: 100%; min-height: 60px; padding: 8px; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-s); font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.9rem; resize: vertical; box-sizing: border-box; }
        .reply-form button { padding: 6px 14px; background: var(--wds-primary); color: white; border: none; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-s); cursor: pointer; margin-top: 6px; font-size: 0.85rem; }
        .reply-toggle { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--wds-primary); cursor: pointer; padding: 6px 0; margin-left: 32px; user-select: none; font-weight: 600; }
        .reply-toggle:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

        /* 멤버 패널 */
        .member-panel-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; }
        .member-panel-header:hover #memberPanelArrow { color: var(--wds-primary); }

        /* 팀 카드 */
        .team-create-btn { padding: 10px 16px; background: var(--wds-primary); color: white; border: none; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 600; }
        .team-create-btn:hover { background: var(--wds-primary-hover); }
        .team-card { background: var(--wds-gray-100); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); padding: 16px; margin-bottom: 10px; position: relative; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); }
        .team-name { font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 6px; padding-right: 60px; }
        .team-period { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--wds-gray-700); margin-bottom: 4px; }
        .team-song { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--wds-primary); margin-bottom: 10px; font-weight: 600; }
        .team-slots { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; }
        .team-slot { background: white; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 16px; font-size: 0.82rem; }
        .team-slot strong { color: var(--wds-primary); margin-right: 4px; }
        .team-card-actions { position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; display: flex; gap: 4px; }
        .team-edit, .team-delete { background: none; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 4px 10px; color: var(--wds-gray-700); }
        .team-edit:hover { border-color: var(--wds-primary); color: var(--wds-primary); }
        .team-delete:hover { border-color: #e74c3c; color: #e74c3c; }
        #teamFormContainer { background: white; border: 1px solid var(--wds-primary); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); padding: 16px; margin-top: 12px; }
        #teamFormContainer h4 { margin: 0 0 14px; font-size: 1.05rem; color: var(--wds-primary); }
        #teamFormContainer input[type="text"], #teamFormContainer input[type="date"], #teamFormContainer select { padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-s); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 0.9rem; font-family: inherit; }
        .team-form-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
        .team-form-row > * { margin-bottom: 0 !important; }
        .team-form-row input { flex: 1; }
        .team-slot-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 6px; }
        .team-slot-row .slot-session-input { flex: 0 0 90px; margin-bottom: 0 !important; }
        .team-slot-row select { flex: 1; margin-bottom: 0 !important; }
        .slot-remove { padding: 4px 10px; background: none; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; color: var(--wds-gray-500); flex-shrink: 0; }
        .slot-remove:hover { border-color: #e74c3c; color: #e74c3c; }
        .music-search-box { background: var(--wds-gray-100); padding: 10px; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-s); margin-bottom: 12px; }
        .music-search-box label { font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--wds-gray-700); display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; }
        #musicResults { max-height: 240px; overflow-y: auto; margin-top: 6px; background: white; border-radius: 4px; }
        #musicResults:empty { display: none; }
        .music-result { display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 8px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-100); }
        .music-result:hover { background: var(--wds-primary-light); }
        .music-result img { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .music-result-info { min-width: 0; flex: 1; }
        .music-result-title { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
        .music-result-artist { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--wds-gray-500); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
        .team-form-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 12px; }
        .team-form-actions button { flex: 1; padding: 10px; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-s); border: none; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; }
        .team-save-btn { background: var(--wds-primary); color: white; }
        .team-cancel-btn { background: var(--wds-gray-100); color: var(--wds-gray-700); border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300) !important; }
        .add-slot-btn { padding: 8px 14px; background: white; border: 1px dashed var(--wds-gray-500); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-s); cursor: pointer; color: var(--wds-gray-700); font-size: 0.85rem; width: 100%; margin-top: 4px; }
        .add-slot-btn:hover { border-color: var(--wds-primary); color: var(--wds-primary); }

        /* 다중 곡 */
        .song-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
        .song-chip { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 6px 10px; background: white; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); }
        .song-chip img { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; object-fit: cover; }
        .song-chip-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
        .song-chip-title { font-size: 0.88rem; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
        .song-chip-artist { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--wds-gray-500); }
        .song-chip-remove { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: var(--wds-gray-400); font-size: 1.1rem; padding: 0 2px; flex-shrink: 0; line-height: 1; }
        .song-chip-remove:hover { color: #e74c3c; }
        .team-songs { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
        .team-song-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; background: white; border: 1px solid var(--wds-primary); border-radius: 20px; padding: 3px 10px 3px 3px; }
        .team-song-item img { width: 22px; height: 22px; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; }
        .team-song-text { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--wds-primary); font-weight: 600; }

        /* 마이페이지 패널 */
        .mypage-info-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-100); font-size: 0.9rem; }
        .mypage-info-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
        .mypage-info-label { color: var(--wds-gray-500); font-size: 0.82rem; min-width: 70px; }
        .mypage-info-value { font-weight: 600; text-align: right; word-break: break-all; }
        .mypage-edit-btn { padding: 6px 14px; background: none; border: 1px solid var(--wds-gray-300); border-radius: var(--wds-radius-s); cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--wds-gray-700); }
        .mypage-edit-btn:hover { border-color: var(--wds-primary); color: var(--wds-primary); }

        /* 모바일 반응형 */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            body { padding: 12px 6px; }
            .container { padding: 18px 14px; }
            #landing-page { padding: 36px 20px; margin-top: 4vh; }
            #landing-page h1 { font-size: 1.7rem; }
            #landing-page p { font-size: 0.95rem; margin-bottom: 28px; }
            header h1 { font-size: 1.5rem; }
            .subtitle { font-size: 0.9rem; }
            .form-group { padding: 16px 14px; }
            .user-info { padding: 12px 14px; font-size: 0.9rem; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; }
            .tabs { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; }
            .tab { padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.85rem; flex: 1; min-width: 60px; text-align: center; }
            .calendar-grid { gap: 4px; }
            .calendar-day { min-height: 58px; padding: 3px 2px; }
            .cal-day-num { font-size: 0.85rem; }
            .cal-day-info { font-size: 0.55rem; line-height: 1.15; gap: 0; }
            .calendar-day-header { font-size: 0.75rem; padding-bottom: 8px; }
            .weekly-container { overflow-x: auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; border-radius: var(--wds-radius-m); }
            .weekly-grid:not(.day-grid) { grid-template-columns: 50px repeat(7, 60px) !important; min-width: 470px; }
            .day-grid { grid-template-columns: 88px 1fr !important; }
            .weekly-cell { padding: 8px 4px; font-size: 0.78rem; }
            .weekly-time-cell { padding: 6px 3px; }
            .weekly-time-cell > div:first-child { font-size: 0.76rem !important; }
            .weekly-time-cell > div:last-child { font-size: 0.6rem !important; }
            .weekly-slot { height: 50px; font-size: 0.7rem; }
            .day-grid .weekly-slot { padding-left: 12px !important; height: 48px; }
            .weekly-header-cell { padding: 10px 4px; font-size: 0.85rem; }
            .admin-subtabs { overflow-x: auto; flex-wrap: nowrap; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; }
            .admin-subtab { padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 0.82rem; white-space: nowrap; }
            .admin-section { padding: 16px 12px; }
            .admin-section-title { font-size: 0.95rem; }
            .my-res-item { padding: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; }
            .my-res-info { flex: 1 1 100%; }
            .stat-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
            .stat-card { padding: 10px 12px; }
            .stat-value { font-size: 1.2rem; }
            .privacy-box { padding: 12px; font-size: 0.78rem; }
            .notice-card { padding: 14px 14px; }
            .notice-content { font-size: 0.9rem; }
            .submit-btn { padding: 14px; font-size: 1rem; }
            .comment-item { padding: 12px; }
            .comment-replies { margin-left: 14px; padding-left: 8px; }
            .instrument-buttons { gap: 6px; }
            .inst-btn { font-size: 0.85rem; padding: 8px 10px; }
            .email-form input, .email-form button { font-size: 0.95rem; }
            .view-header { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; }
            .view-title { font-size: 1.1rem; }
            #auto-toast { bottom: 16px; padding: 10px 18px; font-size: 0.82rem; max-width: 90vw; white-space: normal; text-align: center; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div id="auto-toast"></div>

    <!-- 공지사항 (항상 표시) -->
    <div id="notice_container" class="hidden"></div>

    <!-- Landing/Login -->
    <div id="landing-page">
        <h1>Gather All Around</h1>
        <p>게더올어라운드 이용 시스템</p>

        <!-- 이메일 로그인/회원가입 (메인) -->
        <div id="email-section">
            <!-- 로그인 폼 -->
            <div id="email-login-form" class="email-form">
                <input type="email" id="loginEmail" placeholder="이메일" autocomplete="email">
                <input type="password" id="loginPassword" placeholder="비밀번호" autocomplete="current-password">
                <button type="button" class="email-primary-btn" onclick="handleEmailLogin()">로그인</button>
                <button type="button" class="email-secondary-btn" onclick="showSignupForm()">아직 회원이 아니신가요? 회원가입</button>
            </div>

            <!-- 회원가입 폼 -->
            <div id="email-signup-form" class="email-form hidden">
                <input type="text" id="signupName" placeholder="이름 (실명)" autocomplete="name">
                <input type="tel" id="signupPhone" placeholder="전화번호 (010-0000-0000)" autocomplete="tel">
                <input type="email" id="signupEmail" placeholder="이메일" autocomplete="email">
                <input type="password" id="signupPassword" placeholder="비밀번호 (6자 이상)" autocomplete="new-password">
                <input type="password" id="signupPasswordConfirm" placeholder="비밀번호 확인" autocomplete="new-password">

                <!-- 악기 선택 -->
                <div class="instrument-section">
                    <div class="form-label-text">메인 세션</div>
                    <div class="instrument-buttons">
                        <button type="button" class="inst-btn" data-inst="보컬" onclick="toggleInstrument(this)">🎤 보컬</button>
                        <button type="button" class="inst-btn" data-inst="기타" onclick="toggleInstrument(this)">🎸 기타</button>
                        <button type="button" class="inst-btn" data-inst="베이스" onclick="toggleInstrument(this)">🎵 베이스</button>
                        <button type="button" class="inst-btn" data-inst="키보드" onclick="toggleInstrument(this)">🎹 키보드</button>
                        <button type="button" class="inst-btn" data-inst="드럼" onclick="toggleInstrument(this)">🥁 드럼</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="instrument-customs">
                        <input type="text" id="customInst1" placeholder="추가 세션 (선택)" maxlength="20">
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="privacy-box">
                    <strong>개인정보 수집·이용 동의 (필수)</strong><br>
                    • 수집 항목: 이름, 전화번호, 이메일 주소, 메인 세션<br>
                    • 수집 목적: 합주실 예약 서비스 제공, 예약 확인 및 안내<br>
                    • 보유 기간: 회원 탈퇴 시까지<br>
                    • 동의를 거부할 권리가 있으며, 거부 시 회원가입이 제한됩니다.
                </div>
                <label class="privacy-label">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="privacyConsent">
                    위 개인정보 수집·이용에 동의합니다.
                </label>

                <button type="button" class="email-primary-btn" onclick="handleEmailSignup()">회원가입 신청</button>
                <button type="button" class="email-secondary-btn" onclick="showLoginForm()">로그인으로 돌아가기</button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- 카카오 로그인 (회원가입 버튼 아래) -->
        <div class="kakao-divider"><span>또는</span></div>
        <div id="kakao-section">
            <button type="button" id="kakao-login-btn" class="kakao-login-btn">
                <img src="https://developers.kakao.com/tool/resource/static/img/button/login/full/ko/kakao_login_medium_wide.png" alt="카카오 로그인">
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 승인 대기 화면 -->
    <div id="pending-screen" class="hidden">
        <div class="pending-icon">⏳</div>
        <h2>관리자 승인 대기 중</h2>
        <p>
            <strong id="pendingName"></strong>님,<br>
            회원가입 신청이 완료되었습니다.<br><br>
            관리자 승인 후 서비스 이용이 가능하며,<br>
            승인은 영업일 기준 1일 이내에 처리됩니다.
        </p>
        <button type="button" class="email-secondary-btn" onclick="handleLogout()">로그아웃</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <div id="main-content" class="container hidden">
        <header>
            <h1>Gather All Around</h1>
            <p class="subtitle">게더올어라운드 이용 시스템</p>
        </header>

        <div id="userInfoArea" class="user-info">
            <span><strong id="userNameDisplay"></strong>님, 환영합니다!</span>
            <button type="button" class="logout-btn" onclick="handleLogout()">로그아웃</button>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group" id="mypagePanel">
            <div class="member-panel-header" onclick="toggleMypagePanel()">
                <span class="label" style="margin:0">👤 마이페이지</span>
                <span id="mypagePanelArrow" style="font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--wds-gray-500)">▼ 펼치기</span>
            </div>
            <div id="mypagePanelContent" class="hidden" style="margin-top:16px"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="form-group" id="memberPanel">
            <div class="member-panel-header" onclick="toggleMemberPanel()">
                <span class="label" style="margin:0">👥 멤버 & 팀</span>
                <span id="memberPanelArrow" style="font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--wds-gray-500)">▼ 펼치기</span>
            </div>
            <div id="memberPanelContent" class="hidden" style="margin-top:16px">
                <div class="admin-subtabs">
                    <div class="admin-subtab active" onclick="setMemberTab('list')">멤버 목록</div>
                    <div class="admin-subtab" onclick="setMemberTab('teams')">팀 구성</div>
                </div>
                <div id="memberPanelView"></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <form id="reservationForm">
            <input type="hidden" id="userNameInput">

            <div class="form-group">
                <span class="label">📅 예약 및 확인</span>
                <div class="tabs">
                    <div class="tab active" data-view="month">월간</div>
                    <div class="tab" data-view="week">주간</div>
                    <div class="tab" data-view="day">일간</div>
                </div>

                <div class="view-header">
                    <div id="viewTitle" class="view-title">2026.05</div>
                    <div class="nav-btns">
                        <button type="button" class="nav-btn" id="prevBtn"><</button>
                        <button type="button" class="nav-btn" id="todayBtn">오늘</button>
                        <button type="button" class="nav-btn" id="nextBtn">></button>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div id="viewContainer"></div>
                <input type="hidden" id="selectedDate" required>
                <input type="hidden" id="selectedTime" required>
            </div>

            <button type="submit" class="submit-btn">예약 하기</button>
        </form>

        <div id="result" class="result-card"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Comments -->
    <div id="comments_container" class="hidden">
        <h2>댓글</h2>
        <div class="comment-form">
            <textarea id="commentInput" placeholder="댓글을 입력하세요..."></textarea>
            <button type="button" class="comment-submit-btn" onclick="postComment()">댓글 등록</button>
        </div>
        <div id="commentList"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Scripts -->
    <!-- Supabase SDK -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
    <!-- Kakao SDK v1 (Popup 지원을 위해 복구) -->
    <script src="https://t1.kakaocdn.net/kakao_js_sdk/1.43.0/kakao.min.js"></script>
    <script>
        // 전역 에러 핸들러 추가 (디버깅용)
        window.onerror = function(msg, url, lineNo, columnNo, error) {
            console.error('Global Error: ' + msg + ' at ' + url + ':' + lineNo);
            return false;
        };

        // --- Configuration ---
        const KAKAO_KEY = '9627dd6537f30f1c42b30de51ceea2cf';
        const SUPABASE_URL = 'https://xdcygyvsybsirmaknmpq.supabase.co'; 
        const SUPABASE_KEY = 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6InhkY3lneXZzeWJzaXJtYWtubXBxIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzgxNTMxNTIsImV4cCI6MjA5MzcyOTE1Mn0.KknBzg2OfcsVawxp0BTBJuwXMWX6tNZo-6nCm64nGeI'; 
        const ADMIN_ID = '4883868250'; // 관리자 카카오 ID (최경수)

        let supabaseClient = null;

        // --- Kakao Auth ---
        function initKakao() {
            try {
                if (typeof Kakao !== 'undefined' && !Kakao.isInitialized()) {
                    Kakao.init(KAKAO_KEY);
                    console.log("Kakao SDK v1 Initialized:", Kakao.isInitialized());
                }
            } catch (e) {
                console.error("Kakao Init Error:", e);
            }
        }

        function handleLogin() {
            console.log("카카오 로그인 시퀀스 시작 (v1 Popup)...");
            if (typeof Kakao === 'undefined') {
                alert("카카오 SDK를 불러오는 중입니다. 잠시 후 다시 시도해 주세요.");
                return;
            }
            if (!Kakao.isInitialized()) initKakao();

            Kakao.Auth.login({
                success: function(auth) {
                    console.log("카카오 인증 성공:", auth);
                    Kakao.API.request({
                        url: '/v2/user/me',
                        success: function(res) {
                            console.log("사용자 정보 요청 성공:", res);
                            const nickname = (res.kakao_account && res.kakao_account.profile) 
                                ? res.kakao_account.profile.nickname 
                                : (res.properties ? res.properties.nickname : '사용자');
                            const kakaoId = res.id.toString();
                            state.user = { nickname, kakaoId };
                            loginUI(nickname);
                        },
                        fail: function(err) {
                            alert("사용자 정보 요청 실패: " + JSON.stringify(err));
                        }
                    });
                },
                fail: function(err) {
                    console.error("카카오 인증 실패:", err);
                    alert("로그인 실패: " + (err.error_description || err.error || "알 수 없는 오류"));
                }
            });
        }

        async function handleLogout() {
            // 이메일 사용자: Supabase 세션 종료
